reconfigure.title: Update API Token
reconfigure.description: Enter a new API token or leave empty to keep the current one. You can generate a token at [Amber Developer Settings]({api_url}).

data_description.api_token: Leave empty to keep the current token

data_description.site_name: A friendly name for this site

reconfigure_sites.title: Select Sites
reconfigure_sites.description: Select the sites you want to monitor. Deselecting a site will remove it from the integration.

select_sites.title: Select Sites
select_sites.description: Multiple sites were found. Select the sites you want to configure.

user.title: Amber Express Trader
user.description: Enter your Amber Electric API token. You can generate one at [Amber Developer Settings]({api_url}).

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API token. Please check the token and try again.
error.no_sites: No active sites found for this API token.
error.no_sites_selected: Please select at least one site to configure.
error.rate_limited: Rate limited by Amber API. Please wait a moment and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This API token is already configured.
abort.already_in_progress: Configuration is already in progress. Please refresh the page and try again.

data_description.site: The Amber site whose trading and context options you want to edit
data_description.title: The display name for this integration

data_description.battery_power_entity: Optional battery power entity. W values are converted to kW.
data_description.battery_soc_entity: Optional battery state of charge percentage entity.
data_description.charge_price_ceiling: Import price at or below this value is considered profitable for grid charging.
data_description.confirmation_timeout: Maximum seconds to wait for confirmed price before using estimates. Set to 0 to wait indefinitely.
data_description.demand_window_price: Price to add to general channel during demand windows. Set high (e.g. $50) to prevent imports during demand periods.
data_description.enable_websocket: Enable WebSocket for real-time price updates (alpha feature)
data_description.export_price_floor: Feed-in price at or above this value is considered profitable for export.
data_description.fixed_boundary_offsets: Comma-separated seconds after each interval boundary to poll before falling back to adaptive polling.
data_description.forecast_intervals: How many future intervals to request from the Amber API (maps to the `next` parameter). Range: 1 to 2048. Availability may be capped by the API.
data_description.grid_power_entity: Optional grid power entity. W values are converted to kW.
data_description.house_load_entity: Optional house load entity. W values are converted to kW.
data_description.inverter_max_charge_kw: Inverter maximum charge rate in kW.
data_description.inverter_max_discharge_kw: Inverter maximum discharge rate in kW.
data_description.polling_strategy: Adaptive uses the learned CDF schedule. Fixed boundary polls only at configured boundary offsets. Hybrid polls fixed offsets first, then adaptive.
data_description.pricing_mode: AEMO is Amber's displayed price (per_kwh). APP uses Amber's predicted price (advanced_price_predicted).
data_description.pv_energy_today_entity: Optional entity containing PV energy generated so far today. Wh values are converted to kWh.
data_description.pv_forecast_remaining_today_entity: Optional entity containing forecast PV energy remaining today. Wh values are converted to kWh.
data_description.site_name: A friendly name for this site
data_description.solar_power_entity: Optional solar power entity. W values are converted to kW.
data_description.battery_charge_energy_today_entity: Optional entity containing battery charge energy so far today. Wh values are converted to kWh.
data_description.battery_discharge_energy_today_entity: Optional entity containing battery discharge energy so far today. Wh values are converted to kWh.
data_description.spike_price_threshold: Import price at or above this value is treated as a spike.
data_description.target_grid_buy_kwh: Daily energy target to buy from the grid. The target sensor schedules this across the cheapest forecast intervals below the charge ceiling.
data_description.zero_price_deadband: Prices within this absolute value are treated as zero.
data_description.wait_for_confirmed: When enabled, sensors only update when a confirmed (non-estimated) price is received.

confirm.title: Migrate pricing mode for {site_name}
